reviews.comment:
Buen parador; atencion en islas ok, atencion en shop floja. La comida es buena. Estacionamiento amplio.

(Translated by Google)
Good inn; service on the islands is okay, service in the shop is poor. The food is good. Ample parking.

reviews.comment:
